context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the phoenix-json-api instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use the `:api` pipeline** — don't mix HTML and JSON pipelines; API routes skip CSRF and sessions

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Render errors as structured JSON** — `{:error, changeset}` must become `{"errors": {...}}`

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `FallbackController` for consistent error handling** — every action returns `{:ok, result}` or `{:error, reason}`

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define the route** in the `:api` (or `:api_auth`) pipeline scope with a versioned URL prefix

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Create the controller** with `action_fallback MyAppWeb.FallbackController` and return `{:ok, _}` / `{:error, _}` from every action

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify error responses** — confirm that invalid input and missing resources return structured JSON (e.g., `{"errors": {...}}`) before proceeding
